name: Transform data between formats
task: Create /tmp/eval_transform.py that reads /tmp/eval_data.csv and writes /tmp/eval_data.json with the data grouped by department. Output format: {"Engineering": [{"name": "Alice", "email": "alice@co.com"}, ...], "Marketing": [...]}. Run the script after creating it.

validation.script: import json; d = json.load(open('/tmp/eval_data.json')); assert set(d.keys()) == {'Engineering', 'Marketing'}, f'keys {sorted(d.keys())}'; eng = d['Engineering']; mkt = d['Marketing']; assert len(eng) == 2 and len(mkt) == 2, f'group sizes {len(eng)},{len(mkt)}'; assert [r['name'] for r in eng] == ['Alice', 'Charlie'], f'eng names {[r["name"] for r in eng]}'; assert [r['name'] for r in mkt] == ['Bob', 'Diana'], f'mkt names {[r["name"] for r in mkt]}'; assert eng[0]['email'] == 'alice@co.com' and mkt[0]['email'] == 'bob@co.com', 'emails'; assert all(set(r.keys()) == {'name', 'email'} for grp in d.values() for r in grp), 'each record must have exactly name and email keys'; print('OK')
